title: Oaks Decor
body:
<NEW v2.0.0>
  
DISCLAIMER: This mod has been completely rewritten and remade and DOES NOT support old worlds or the previous mod if enough people ask, I will create a legacy version of this mod for those who want it but it will not be updated any further than porting to a different version

## 📖 [About]

Oaks Decor v2 is the perfect decoration mod for builders and interior designers. Adding a large selection of new decorative and building blocks to enhance your Minecraft world. Adding tons of new decorative and functional blocks that perfectly fit into the vanilla+ aesthetics.

## ✅ [Features]

- Completely remade from the ground up.
- Overhauled new models and vanilla textures
- Now includes all paintings from Oaks Paintings
- Hanging Pot Plants for your builds
- and more!
